steps.t: Erchar is standing outside Hata Kebir. You have arrived at Hata Kebir and should now speak to Erchar before beginning your assault.

Erchar is standing in Hata Kebir. You have defeated Azgarzôr and avenged Garvir. You should speak to Erchar before leaving the camp.
